name: 仙凡終極對決勝利
name_en: Immortal vs System Final Battle Victory
description: 假千金用系統奪走女主修為，看似女主必敗。但男主以天地之子身份出手，系統積分歸零，假千金被世界抹除。正義陣營的絕對碾壓帶來終極爽感。

examples.drama_title: 💔Reborn! Family listened to my inner thoughts, scheming girl cry!#chinesedrama
examples.excerpt: Host points were detected to be zero. / Mission failed / Will be immediately wiped out from this world / Xie Jinwan, that's what you call a flurry of actions as fierce as a tiger. / You really are like an idiot.
